landing.step1Desc: Add the server and API token; it's stored encrypted on the server.
landing.step2Desc: Pull your forms and decide who can view, edit or validate each one.
landing.step3Desc: They view, edit and approve/reject, with their own review flow.
landing.tagline: Manage your KoboToolbox data and give your team access
landing.subtitle: KoboManager is the middle layer that lets your team view, edit and validate submissions — without a Kobo account and without exposing your API token.
landing.feat1Desc: Your team signs in with app users; they don't need a KoboToolbox account.
landing.feat2Desc: Approve or reject submissions with your own validation flow, decoupled from Kobo.
landing.feat3Desc: The Kobo token is stored encrypted on the server and never exposed to the browser.
landing.footer: KoboManager — a management layer for KoboToolbox
landing.feat4Desc: Decide which submissions each user sees —by a field value or by who submitted them—, not just which forms.
landing.moreSubtitle: Built for teams that need to share and analyze data without giving up control and security.
landing.feat5Desc: Share a form by link, no account required: optionally with a password, an expiry date and the same row- and column-level scope you apply to your team.
